VEKS XADRIEL
character page


"Ten years ago, Veks' eldest son betrayed his people to spite his father. Veks is still haunted by the memory and longs to find his son to reconcile...or to give him an honorable death. Now First Officer on the Sturgeon, the Atresciun often argues with Captain Santos about pursuing leads to find his treasonous firstborn. You, newest member of the Sturgeon's crew, unfortunately happen to walk in on one of these arguments."

⚠️cw: family drama, betrayal
